use_cases: Form inputs for accepting terms, conditions, or newsletter subscriptions
Filter selections in data tables or product listings
Settings toggles for feature preferences and configurations
Selection controls in task management or to-do applications
Multi-select options in surveys or questionnaires
ai_summary: A lightweight checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling. Features proper accessibility support with focus states, disabled states, and aria-invalid handling. Suitable for any industry requiring boolean form inputs, from SaaS dashboards to e-commerce checkout flows.
